regulations.name: SSBJ Sustainability Disclosure Standards
regulations.obligation: ISSB-aligned. Mandatory for Prime Market listed from FY2027.

regulations.name: Building Energy Efficiency Act — All New Residential
regulations.obligation: First time residential under mandatory energy code. All new builds.

regulations.name: Operational Energy Intensity Labelling (under review)
regulations.obligation: Proposed replacement for BELS. Under consideration H2 2026–2027.

regulations.name: CASBEE / ZEH-M Programme
regulations.obligation: Voluntary rating and ZEH-M subsidies for multi-family residential.

regulations.name: Environmental Impact Assessment Act
regulations.obligation: Mandatory EIA for large-scale developments (>100 ha residential, major infrastructure). Scoping, public consultation, mitigation plans required.

regulations.name: GX-ETS — Mandatory Emissions Trading
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for emitters >100,000 tCO2/yr from FY2026. ~300–400 companies covering 50–60% of national CO2. Carbon levy from FY2028.

regulations.name: ZEB Mandate — Private Residential Extension
regulations.obligation: ZEB Grade 5 (20% onsite renewables) extended to private residential.

regulations.name: Waste Policy — Mandatory Recycling Before Landfill
regulations.obligation: Mandates recycling/incineration before landfill. Seoul single-use reduction.

regulations.name: KSSB Sustainability Disclosure Standards
regulations.obligation: Korean ISSB adoption. Phased mandatory from FY2028.

regulations.name: G-SEED
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for public buildings >3,000 sqm; voluntary for private.

regulations.name: Environmental Impact Assessment Act
regulations.obligation: Mandatory EIA and Strategic Environmental Assessment for developments above thresholds. Biodiversity offset requirements for habitat loss. Nature baseline surveys required.

regulations.name: SSE/SZSE/BSE Sustainability Reporting
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for index constituents and dual-listed. Phased voluntary for others.

regulations.name: GB/T 50378 Green Building Standard
regulations.obligation: National standard. Many cities mandate one-star minimum for new construction.

regulations.name: EIA Law + Ecological Conservation Redlines
regulations.obligation: Mandatory EIA for all construction projects (1998, amended 2018). Ecological redline system prohibits development in designated zones covering ~25% of land area.

regulations.name: 14th FYP Building Energy Conservation Plan
regulations.obligation: Ultra-low energy building targets. 30% of new urban buildings green by 2025.

regulations.name: HKEX Climate Disclosure (ISSB-aligned)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for Main Board issuers. All issuers by 2027.

regulations.name: Building Energy Efficiency Ordinance (Cap 610)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory BEC compliance for prescribed buildings on major retrofits.

regulations.name: BEAM Plus v2.0
regulations.obligation: Voluntary. Enhanced climate resilience and wellbeing credits.

regulations.name: EIA Ordinance (Cap. 499)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory EIA for designated projects (reclamation, major roads, large developments in sensitive areas). Environmental Permit required.

regulations.name: SFC Climate Risk Management (Fund Managers)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for SFC-licensed fund managers: integrate climate-related risks into investment and risk management. Cross-Agency Steering Group 2026–2028 priorities include transition plan disclosure.

regulations.name: AASB S1/S2 Climate Disclosure (Group 1)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory climate disclosure for entities >$500m revenue. Group 2 from Jul 2026.

regulations.name: Green Star Buildings v1.1
regulations.obligation: Voluntary. Adds nature, biodiversity, circularity credits. New builds + major retrofits.

regulations.name: NABERS Mandatory Disclosure (CBD Programme)
regulations.obligation: Office >1,000 sqm NLA: NABERS rating at sale/lease. Penalties for non-disclosure.

regulations.name: NCC 2022 Section J — Energy Efficiency
regulations.obligation: Mandatory energy efficiency standards for all new commercial buildings.

regulations.name: NABERS Expansion — BTR & PBSA
regulations.obligation: Consultation on extending NABERS to build-to-rent and student accommodation.

regulations.name: Modern Slavery Act 2018
regulations.obligation: Annual modern slavery statement for entities >$100m revenue. Construction identified as high-risk sector for supply chain risks.

regulations.name: EPBC Act + Nature Positive Reforms
regulations.obligation: Federal EIA for matters of national environmental significance. Environment Protection Australia established 2024. Nature Positive Plan proposes national environmental standard and nature repair market.

regulations.name: Social Procurement Frameworks (VIC/NSW)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory social procurement for Victorian government projects >$20m. NSW similar requirements. Employment targets, social enterprises, Aboriginal participation.

regulations.name: ASFI Sustainable Finance Taxonomy
regulations.obligation: First Australian taxonomy. Defines green and credible transition activities. Treasury transition planning guidance expected. Voluntary.

regulations.name: Mandatory Climate-Related Disclosures (FMC Act)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for large listed issuers, banks, insurers, asset managers. World-first.

regulations.name: NABERSNZ Energy Rating
regulations.obligation: Voluntary energy rating for office buildings. NABERS-aligned.

regulations.name: Green Star NZ / Homestar
regulations.obligation: Voluntary. Green Star NZ (commercial) and Homestar (residential) rating tools operated by NZGBC. Growing adoption but no mandatory minimum.

regulations.name: Resource Management Act — Assessment of Effects
regulations.obligation: Mandatory assessment of environmental effects for resource consents. Covers ecological impact, landscape, indigenous biodiversity. RMA being replaced by Natural and Built Environment Act.

regulations.name: BCA Green Mark (2021)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for new buildings >5,000 sqm GFA.

regulations.name: BCA Mandatory Energy Improvement (MEI)
regulations.obligation: Existing buildings >5,000 sqm: ≥10% EUI reduction target.

regulations.name: SGX Listing Rules 711A/B
regulations.obligation: ISSB-aligned climate disclosure for all listed issuers, phased.

regulations.name: MAS Transition Planning Guidelines
regulations.obligation: Banks, insurers, asset managers: transition plans, engagement over divestment.

regulations.name: Beverage Container Return Scheme
regulations.obligation: Islandwide reverse-vending network. Retail assets must accommodate infrastructure.

regulations.name: Environmental Impact Assessment (EPMA)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory EIA for designated activities under Environmental Protection & Management Act. Expanded scope for developments near nature reserves.

regulations.name: BCA Landscape Replacement Areas (LRA)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory greenery replacement for developments that remove existing landscaping. Quantified replacement ratio enforced through planning approval.

regulations.name: Bursa Malaysia Enhanced Sustainability Reporting
regulations.obligation: ISSB-aligned disclosure for Main Market listed issuers.

regulations.name: Green Building Index (GBI)
regulations.obligation: Voluntary green building rating. No mandatory minimum energy code.

regulations.name: OJK Sustainable Finance Roadmap Phase II
regulations.obligation: Enhanced sustainability reporting for FIs. Transition plan expectations.

regulations.name: Greenship Rating System
regulations.obligation: Voluntary green building rating. Some Jakarta government buildings mandated.

regulations.name: TREES
regulations.obligation: Voluntary green building rating. Growing adoption in commercial.

regulations.name: Energy Efficiency Act — Building Energy Code
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for new designated buildings >2,000 sqm. Limited enforcement.

regulations.name: SEC Sustainability Reporting (One Report)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for SET-listed companies. Climate disclosure aligned with TCFD.

regulations.name: SEBI BRSR / BRSR Core
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for top 1,000 listed companies. BRSR Core with assurance from FY2024.

regulations.name: Energy Conservation Building Code (ECBC 2017)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for commercial >100 kW connected load in adopting states. Patchy enforcement.

regulations.name: IGBC / GRIHA Rating Systems
regulations.obligation: Voluntary. IGBC (private) and GRIHA (government). Growing adoption.

regulations.name: EIA Notification 2006
regulations.obligation: Mandatory EIA for construction projects >20,000 sqm built-up area. Category A/B classification. Coastal Regulation Zone restrictions. Compliance variable across states.

regulations.name: Energy Conservation (Amendment) Act 2022
regulations.obligation: Carbon credit trading, mandatory building energy codes for large commercial.

regulations.name: MEES — Minimum Energy Efficiency Standards
regulations.obligation: EPC E minimum for all lettings. Penalties up to £150k. Proposed uplift to C/B.

regulations.name: UK SDS (ISSB endorsement)
regulations.obligation: UK endorsement of ISSB S1/S2. Consultation ongoing.

regulations.name: Future Homes Standard / Part L Uplift
regulations.obligation: 75-80% carbon reduction vs 2013 baseline. All new homes.

regulations.name: Whole Life Carbon — London Plan
regulations.obligation: Mandatory WLC assessment for GLA-referable developments.

regulations.name: Modern Slavery Act — Construction Supply Chains
regulations.obligation: Annual modern slavery statement for entities >£36m turnover.

regulations.name: TPT Disclosure Framework
regulations.obligation: Voluntary best-practice framework for climate transition plans (published Oct 2023). HMG consultation on mandatory transition plan requirements launched. FCA expected to align with UK SDS.

regulations.name: Social Value Act 2012 (+ Social Value Model 2021)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory for all central government procurement above threshold. Construction is the largest category. Social Value Model (2021) requires measurable social outcomes — employment, skills, community benefit.

regulations.name: s.106 Planning Obligations / CIL
regulations.obligation: Mandatory planning obligations on major developments — affordable housing quotas, community infrastructure, local employment and training plans. Developer contributions enforced through planning consent.

regulations.name: Biodiversity Net Gain (BNG)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory 10% BNG for major developments in England. Smaller sites from Apr 2024. 30-year management and maintenance obligation.

regulations.name: Décret Tertiaire
regulations.obligation: -40% energy by 2030, -50% by 2040, -60% by 2050. Tertiary >1,000 sqm. Penalties.

regulations.name: RE2020 — Whole-Life Carbon Caps
regulations.obligation: Carbon caps for new residential + tertiary. Tightening pathway to 2031. Penalties.

regulations.name: Zéro Artificialisation Nette (ZAN)
regulations.obligation: Target of zero net land-take by 2050, 50% reduction by 2031 vs 2011–2021 baseline. Mandatory for local planning documents (PLU/SCoT). Directly constrains greenfield RE development.

regulations.name: Loi sur le Devoir de Vigilance
regulations.obligation: Mandatory duty of care for companies >5,000 employees (France) or >10,000 (global). Covers human rights, environment, health/safety across supply chain. Broader than modern slavery — includes community impact.

regulations.name: Article 29 LEC — Financial ESG Disclosure
regulations.obligation: Mandatory ESG/climate disclosure for French asset managers, insurers, pension funds. Exceeds EU SFDR — requires biodiversity impact, fossil fuel exclusion policy, Paris-alignment strategy.

regulations.name: CSRD — Corporate Sustainability Reporting
regulations.obligation: Phased by entity size. ESRS standards. Double materiality. Assurance required.

regulations.name: EU Nature Restoration Regulation
regulations.obligation: 20% of degraded ecosystems restored by 2030. Urban greening provisions.

regulations.name: CSRD Omnibus — Scope Narrowing (Draft)
regulations.obligation: Proposes narrowing CSRD to >1,000 employees. Delays wave 2.

regulations.name: EPBD Recast — Energy Performance of Buildings
regulations.obligation: Zero-emission building standard for new builds from 2030. Renovation passports.

regulations.name: SEC Climate Disclosure Rule (stayed)
regulations.obligation: Voluntarily stayed pending litigation. Federal scope uncertain.

regulations.name: NYC Local Law 97
regulations.obligation: Emissions caps for buildings >25,000 sqft. Penalties from 2024. City-level.

regulations.name: WA Clean Buildings Performance Standard
regulations.obligation: Tier 1 >50,000 sqft by Jun 2026, Tier 2 >20,000 sqft by 2028.

regulations.name: UFLPA
regulations.obligation: Import ban on goods from Xinjiang. Affects solar panel + construction materials supply chains.

regulations.name: CSSB IFRS S1/S2 Adoption
regulations.obligation: Canadian ISSB adoption. Consultation phase.

regulations.name: BC Energy Step Code
regulations.obligation: Mandatory energy performance tiers for new buildings. Provincial (BC only).

regulations.name: Canada Green Buildings Strategy
regulations.obligation: Net-zero-emissions-ready model code by 2030. Consultation.

regulations.name: Market-Wide Concrete Carbon Benchmark
regulations.obligation: Voluntary industry benchmark establishing a market-wide embodied carbon baseline for concrete. Developed by CapitaLand Development and Climate Group ConcreteZero initiative.

regulations.name: AASB S1/S2 — Physical Climate Risk Disclosure
regulations.obligation: Mandatory physical climate risk scenario analysis and metric disclosure under AASB S2 (ISSB-aligned). Group 1 entities from Jan 2025. Requires identification of acute and chronic physical risks and disclosure of associated financial impacts on real estate assets.

regulations.name: HKEX Climate Disclosure — Physical Risk Requirements
regulations.obligation: Mandatory physical climate risk disclosure under HKEX Listing Rules (ISSB S2-aligned). Listed issuers required to disclose exposure to physical climate risks including scenario analysis. Effective for financial years commencing on or after 1 Jan 2025.

regulations.name: Mandatory Climate Disclosures — Physical Risk (FMC Act)
regulations.obligation: Mandatory physical climate risk disclosure under the Financial Markets Conduct Act. TCFD-aligned framework explicitly requiring physical risk scenario analysis for large listed issuers, registered banks, and licensed insurers.

regulations.name: CSRD / ESRS E1 — Physical Climate Risk
regulations.obligation: CSRD requires double materiality assessment including physical climate risk impacts. ESRS E1 mandates disclosure of physical risk exposure, scenario analysis, and resilience of strategy against acute and chronic physical risks. Large companies from FY2024.

regulations.name: UK Mandatory TCFD — Physical Risk Reporting
regulations.obligation: Mandatory TCFD-aligned reporting for UK listed companies and large private companies explicitly includes physical climate risk disclosures covering acute and chronic risks. FCA Listing Rules and Companies Act provisions.

regulations.name: PCRAM — Physical Climate Risk Assessment Methodology (IIGCC)
regulations.obligation: Voluntary framework by IIGCC providing standardised methodology for assessing physical climate risks in real estate portfolios. Covers flood, heat stress, wind, subsidence, and sea-level rise at asset level. Increasingly referenced in institutional investor mandates and real estate fund due diligence.

regulations.name: Article 173-VI / Art 29 LEC — Physical Risk Disclosure
regulations.obligation: Pioneer mandatory physical climate risk disclosure for institutional investors. Article 173 (2015 Energy Transition Law) and successor Article 29 (2019 Energy-Climate Law) require institutional investors to disclose physical climate risk exposure in portfolios including real estate.

regulations.name: SGX Listing Rules — Physical Climate Risk Disclosure
regulations.obligation: SGX sustainability reporting requirements (TCFD-aligned) mandate physical climate risk disclosure for listed issuers. Climate reporting expanding to all issuers from FY2025. MAS guidance reinforces physical risk scenario analysis requirements for financial institutions with real estate exposures.

regulations.name: NABERS Embodied Carbon Rating (Pilot)
regulations.obligation: Pilot voluntary rating for upfront embodied carbon in new buildings and major refurbishments. NABERS developing standardised methodology to benchmark and compare whole-life embodied carbon intensity.
